subject: FloodClaims Pro — Full Security Audit Results
body:
## Security Audit Complete — 14 Findings

I ran a full audit on billy-floods.up.railway.app. Here's the summary:

### CRITICAL (4)
1. Session cookie missing Secure flag
2. CSP allows unsafe-inline AND unsafe-eval (defeats CSP entirely)
3. Hardcoded admin password 'admin1234' as fallback + displayed on login page
4. Hardcoded API keys in scripts/willie_test.py and scripts/browser_test_suite.py

### HIGH (3)
5. HSTS header missing
6. No rate limiting on login endpoint (5/5 brute force attempts succeeded)
7. No password policy (no minlength, no confirmation field)

### MEDIUM (4)
8. /api/status exposes claim counts without auth
9. /forgot-password returns 404 (feature missing)
10. Credentials displayed in plain text on login page
11. No autocomplete on password field

### LOW (3)
12. No server-side file upload size limit
13. No X-Permitted-Cross-Domain-Policies header
14. X-XSS-Protection header is deprecated

### Action Items
Please start with: Rotate exposed API keys, remove hardcoded password fallback, tighten CSP, add HSTS.

Full details in the audit report — let me know when you've reviewed and we'll prioritize fixes.
